# Code Anchors: Code Anchors

- `.claude/commands/nxs.distill.md` — Phase 5 step 2: regenerate each touched concept's anchor from the diff paths plus an alias-grep, SHA-stamped and marked derived; defines both the single-repo scalar form and the hub per-repo mapping.
- `libs/portable-tools/src/validate-concepts.ts` — routes anchor sidecars by layout and validates their format: the single-repo scalar revision with unqualified paths, or the hub per-repo revision mapping with every path attributed to exactly one mapped repo.
